meta.project: Galata Greek School CMS — Admin Panel

product_overview: Admin panel for the Galata Greek School CMS provides authenticated management for archive artifacts, events, venue hire, history timeline, categories, page content and a new Test Plans QA module. It mirrors existing admin patterns (stat cards, sidebar modules) and performs CRUD operations via Supabase.
core_goals: Provide full CRUD management for archive artifacts, events, venues, history entries, categories and page content within a single Admin interface.
Protect referential integrity on deletions (orphan protection for categories/subcategories).
Add an integrated Test Plans module to author, execute and track QA test plans and test cases (plan header + child cases model).
Keep UI consistent with existing admin design patterns (stat cards, sidebar navigation, inline forms).
Ensure required-field validation and date/field-specific validation on forms.
Expose quick actions and dashboard metrics to speed common workflows.

features.name: Admin Login
features.description: Inline login form on the /admin page allowing administrators to authenticate and access the dashboard and protected modules.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> See inline login form -> Fill email input with admin email -> Fill password input with admin password -> Click Giris Yap button -> See admin dashboard load with sidebar
Navigate to /admin -> Fill email input -> Leave password input empty -> Click Giris Yap button -> See validation error for missing password
Navigate to /admin -> Fill email input with invalid credentials -> Fill password input -> Click Giris Yap button -> See authentication failure message

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Authenticated dashboard showing stat cards, quick actions and sidebar navigation to the nine admin modules (including the new Test Plans tab).
user_flows: Navigate to /admin (authenticated) -> See stat cards with total counts (artifacts, past_events, venue_events, history_timeline, page_content, archive_categories, istanbul_rum, test_plans) -> Click sidebar tab for artifacts -> Artifacts module loads
Navigate to /admin (not authenticated) -> See inline login form -> Attempt to access dashboard features -> See login required / inline login form
Navigate to /admin -> Click quick action Yeni Test Planı -> Open Create Test Plan form

features.name: Admin Artifacts
features.description: CRUD management for archive artifacts with trilingual fields, image upload and required-field validation. Artifacts are created/edited from the /admin panel under the Artifacts module.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> Click sidebar tab artifacts -> See artifacts table with columns Görsel | Başlık (TR) | Kategori | Durum | İşlemler -> Click Yeni Eser Ekle -> Fill category_id, sub_category_id, upload image_url, fill title_tr, title_en, title_el, fill description_tr/description_en/description_el, set status -> Click Kaydet -> See new artifact listed in artifacts table

Navigate to /admin -> Click sidebar tab artifacts -> Click Yeni Eser Ekle -> Leave required fields (e.g., image_url or title_tr) empty -> Click Kaydet -> See validation errors for missing required fields
Navigate to /admin -> Click sidebar tab artifacts -> In list click delete on an artifact -> Confirm deletion in window.confirm() -> See artifact removed from table

features.name: Admin Events
features.description: CRUD for past events with date validation and optional thumbnails; create and manage multilingual event records from the Events module in /admin.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> Click sidebar tab events -> See events table with columns Kapak | Başlık (TR) | Tarih | Durum | İşlemler -> Click Yeni Etkinlik Ekle -> Fill event_date, title_tr (and optional title_en/title_el), fill description fields -> Click Kaydet -> See new event in events table
Navigate to /admin -> Click sidebar tab events -> Click Yeni Etkinlik Ekle -> Fill title but enter invalid event_date format or leave event_date empty -> Click Kaydet -> See date validation error
Navigate to /admin -> Click sidebar tab events -> Select an event row -> Click delete -> Confirm deletion -> See event removed from table

features.name: Admin Venue
features.description: Manage venue hire spaces (venue_events) including multilingual titles, capacity fields and floor plan; create, edit and delete venues from the Venue module in /admin.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> Click sidebar tab venue -> See venues table with columns Görsel | Mekan Adı (TR) | Kat | Kapasite | Durum | İşlemler -> Click Yeni Mekan Ekle -> Fill title_tr/title_en/title_el, set level, set gala_capacity/theater_capacity/cocktail_capacity as applicable -> Click Kaydet -> See new venue listed
Navigate to /admin -> Click sidebar tab venue -> Click Yeni Mekan Ekle -> Leave required field level empty -> Click Kaydet -> See validation error for missing level
Navigate to /admin -> Click sidebar tab venue -> Edit an existing venue -> Update features_tr/features_en/features_el via addFeature/removeFeature -> Click Kaydet -> See updated venue data in table

features.name: Admin History
features.description: CRUD for history timeline entries, maintained in order by order_index and supporting trilingual titles and descriptions.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> Click sidebar tab history -> See history table ordered by order_index with columns Yıl | Başlık (TR) | Sıra | Durum | İşlemler -> Click Yeni Tarihce Kaydi Ekle -> Fill year, title_tr, optional description, set order_index -> Click Kaydet -> See new history item placed according to order_index
Navigate to /admin -> Click sidebar tab history -> Click Yeni Tarihce Kaydi Ekle -> Leave required field year or title_tr empty -> Click Kaydet -> See validation error for missing required fields
Navigate to /admin -> Click sidebar tab history -> Click delete on a history row -> Confirm deletion -> See row removed and ordering updated

features.name: Admin Categories
features.description: Manage main categories and subcategories with orphan-protection checks that block deletion when artifacts reference the category or subcategory.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> Click sidebar tab categories -> See Ana Kategoriler table -> Click Yeni Kategori -> Fill type_key, label_tr, label_en, select tab and archive_type -> Click Kaydet -> See category added to main categories table

Navigate to /admin -> Click sidebar tab categories -> Switch to Alt Kategoriler tab -> Click Yeni Alt Kategori -> Fill key_name, label_tr, label_en, parent_category_id -> Click Kaydet -> See subcategory added to subcategories table

Navigate to /admin -> Click sidebar tab categories -> In Ana Kategoriler click delete on a category that has artifacts assigned -> See blocked deletion message "Bu kategoriye bağlı X eser var. Silmeden önce bu eserlerin kategorisini değiştirin." and deletion is not allowed

features.name: Admin Page Content
features.description: Edit and manage page content blocks (page_content) used by the frontend; warn when changing keys that map to frontend pages.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> Click sidebar tab content -> See page content list with Sayfa | Bölüm | İçerik (TR kısa) | İşlemler -> Edit a content row -> Modify content_tr/content_en/content_el -> Click Save/Kaydet -> See updated content in list

Navigate to /admin -> Click sidebar tab content -> Edit a published page_content record -> Change page_key or section_key -> Click Save -> See warning that changing page_key or section_key on published records will break frontend mappings and require explicit confirmation
Navigate to /admin -> Click sidebar tab content -> Click delete on a content entry -> Confirm deletion -> See content removed (with warning about potential frontend breakage)

features.name: Test Plans (New Module)
features.description: Create, manage and execute QA test plans and test cases inside the admin panel using a single-table design (test_cases). Supports plan CRUD, test case CRUD, execution results, duplication and progress tracking.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> Click sidebar tab test_plans -> See Test Planları list with columns Plan Adı | Modül | Durum | İlerleme | İşlem and Quick Action + Yeni Plan -> Click + Yeni Plan -> Fill Plan Adı, Açıklama, Hedef Modül, Durum, optionally choose a template -> Click Kaydet -> See new plan appear in Test Planları list

Navigate to /admin -> Click sidebar tab test_plans -> Click a plan row to open Detail View -> Click + Yeni Test Ekle -> Fill title, steps, expected_result, select target_language -> Click Kaydet -> See new test case listed in plan detail

Navigate to /admin -> Click sidebar tab test_plans -> Open a plan detail -> Click Çalıştır on a test case -> See Execution Panel with steps and expected_result -> Select ✅ Geçti or ❌ Kaldı or Engelli, add notes -> Click Sonucu Kaydet -> See test case result updated with executed_at and executed_by and plan progress updated

Navigate to /admin -> Click sidebar tab test_plans -> Click Kopyala on a plan -> See duplicate plan created with title suffixed (Kopya) and all child cases copied with result:'pending' -> See duplicate appear in list

Navigate to /admin -> Click sidebar tab test_plans -> Click Sil on a plan -> See delete confirmation dialog "[Plan/Test adı] silmek istediğinize emin misiniz?" -> Click Vazgeç -> See plan remains (cancel deletion)
Navigate to /admin -> Click sidebar tab test_plans -> Click + Yeni Plan -> Leave required Plan Adı empty -> Click Kaydet -> See validation error for missing Plan Adı

routes.description: Landing page with hero, about, events sections
Admin panel with inline login form and 9 management modules
Archive collection with Documents and Objects tabs
Venue hire page with floor plans

features.name: Admin Login
features.description: Inline login form embedded in /admin page. Navigate to /admin, fill email and password fields, click Giris Yap button.
user_interactions: Navigate to /admin to see the login form
Fill email input with admin email
Fill password input with admin password
Click Giris Yap button to submit
On success the admin dashboard loads with sidebar

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Dashboard with stat cards and sidebar navigation to 9 modules
user_interactions: View stat cards with total counts
Click sidebar tabs to navigate between modules

features.name: Admin Artifacts
features.description: CRUD for archive artifacts with trilingual support and required field validation
user_interactions: Click Yeni Eser Ekle to create new artifact
Fill required fields and click Kaydet
See validation errors for missing required fields

features.name: Admin Events
features.description: CRUD for past events with date validation
user_interactions: Click Yeni Etkinlik Ekle to create new event

features.name: Admin Venue
user_interactions: Click Yeni Mekan Ekle to create

features.name: Admin History
user_interactions: View history table ordered by order_index
Click Yeni Tarihce Kaydi Ekle to create

features.name: Admin Categories
features.description: CRUD for main and sub categories with orphan protection on delete
user_interactions: Create new category with type_key, label_tr, label_en
Delete blocked if artifacts reference category

known_limitations.issue: Admin login uses plaintext password comparison
Admin session stored in localStorage without expiry
